targets.rawSql: SELECT incident_level FROM ai_incident_summary_day WHERE profile_id = '${profile_id}' ORDER BY dt DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(dt) AS time, confidence_score AS value FROM ai_incident_summary_day WHERE profile_id = '${profile_id}' ORDER BY dt DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(dt) AS time, risk_score AS value FROM ai_incident_summary_day WHERE profile_id = '${profile_id}' ORDER BY dt DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(dt) AS time, predicted_alert_prob AS value FROM ai_incident_summary_day WHERE profile_id = '${profile_id}' ORDER BY dt DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(dt) AS time, CASE incident_level WHEN 'normal' THEN 0 WHEN 'warning' THEN 1 WHEN 'alert' THEN 2 ELSE 0 END AS value FROM ai_incident_summary_day WHERE profile_id = '${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY dt

SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(dt) AS time, confidence_score AS value, 'confidence_score' AS metric FROM ai_incident_summary_day WHERE profile_id = '${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(dt) AS time, predicted_alert_prob AS value, 'predicted_alert_prob' AS metric FROM ai_incident_summary_day WHERE profile_id = '${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY time

panels.title: Confidence Score vs Predicted Alert Probability

targets.rawSql: SELECT dt, incident_level, incident_title, confidence_score, llm_model, executive_summary, technical_summary, business_impact FROM ai_incident_summary_day WHERE profile_id = '${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY dt DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT dt, action_rank, action_type, action_title, priority, owner_hint, evidence, action_detail FROM ai_recommended_action_day WHERE profile_id = '${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY dt DESC, action_rank ASC LIMIT 200

SELECT p.dt, p.predicted_risk_status, p.prob_alert, p.prob_warning, p.prob_normal, a.incident_level, a.incident_title FROM ml_prediction_result p JOIN ai_incident_summary_day a ON p.profile_id = a.profile_id AND p.dt = a.dt WHERE p.profile_id = '${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(p.dt) ORDER BY p.dt DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT action_type, COUNT(*) AS action_count FROM ai_recommended_action_day WHERE profile_id = '${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) GROUP BY action_type ORDER BY action_count DESC

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT profile_id __text, profile_id __value FROM ai_incident_summary_day ORDER BY 1
list.label: profile_id
list.name: profile_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT profile_id __text, profile_id __value FROM ai_incident_summary_day ORDER BY 1

dashboard.title: AI Incident Review for MariaDB v2
